title: pretrea
intro: Pretrea is a type of flowering plant native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of pretrea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Pretrea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
